stage1_sentence: Reflexion includes the Actor as one of its three interconnected models that generates text and actions based on state observations.
stage2_rationale: Actor is one of Reflexion's models

stage1_sentence: The Actor is a component of the Reflexion framework that generates text and actions based on observations and memory.
The Evaluator assesses the quality of the Actor's outputs within the Reflexion framework.
stage2_rationale: Evaluator is within the Reflexion framework

stage1_sentence: Reflexion includes the Evaluator as a component that assesses the quality of the Actor's outputs by computing reward scores.
stage2_rationale: Evaluator is a component of Reflexion

stage1_sentence: Reflexion includes the Self-Reflection model as a component that generates verbal feedback on the Actor's performance to enhance learning and decision-making.
stage2_rationale: component that generates feedback for Reflexion

stage1_sentence: Reflexion includes a self-reflection model that generates verbal feedback on the Actor's performance to enhance future actions.
stage2_rationale: self-reflection model is a component of Reflexion

stage1_sentence: The Evaluator provides performance assessments that inform the Self-Reflection model's feedback on the Actor's outputs.
stage2_rationale: Evaluator informs feedback of Self-Reflection model

stage1_sentence: Self-reflection is the process through which the Self-Reflection model generates verbal feedback based on the Actor's performance.
stage2_rationale: process through which model generates feedback

stage1_sentence: The Self-Reflection model generates verbal feedback that contributes to the process of self-reflection on the Actor's performance.
stage2_rationale: model generates feedback for self-reflection process
